passes.expected_result: Retrieve local Birthday Message campaign status, state, deployment time, and scheduling details from dim_campaign
passes.subtask: Retrieve local Birthday Message campaign status, state, deployment time, and scheduling details from dim_campaign

passes.expected_result: Fetch live Birthday Message campaign status, published state, and current activation status from GET /ajo/journey
passes.subtask: Fetch live Birthday Message campaign status, published state, and current activation status from GET /ajo/journey

passes.expected_result: Compare local snapshot (dim_campaign) vs live platform state (Journey Optimizer API) for Birthday Message campaign - highlight state differences, deployment lag, and scheduling alignment
passes.subtask: Compare local snapshot (dim_campaign) vs live platform state (Journey Optimizer API) for Birthday Message campaign - highlight state differences, deployment lag, and scheduling alignment

raw_preview.candidate_t1_sql:
PATH=SQL
SQL=SELECT 
  dc.CAMPAIGNID,
  dc.NAME,
  dc.STATE,
  dc.CAMPAIGNTYPE,
  dc.ISSCHEDULED,
  dc.ISRECURRING,
  dc.STARTDATE,
  dc.LASTDEPLOYEDTIME,
  dc.STOPPEDTIME,
  dc.FINISHEDTIME,
  dc.UPDATEDTIME,
  dc.SANDBOXNAME,
  dc.SANDBOXID
FROM dim_campaign dc
WHERE dc.NAME = 'Birthday Message'
ORDER BY dc.UPDATEDTIME DESC

PARAMS=[]
raw_preview.route_card:
ROUTE=EVIDENCE
DIRECT_ANSWER=
REASON=Comparing local and live status requires accessing actual runtime data/state of the Birthday Message object from both environments, which is user-specific data retrieval.
raw_preview.task_ledger:
TASK t1 | SQL | [] | Retrieve local Birthday Message campaign status, state, deployment time, and scheduling details from dim_campaign
TASK t2 | API | [] | Fetch live Birthday Message campaign status, published state, and current activation status from GET /ajo/journey
TASK t3 | AGGREGATE | [t1, t2] | Compare local snapshot (dim_campaign) vs live platform state (Journey Optimizer API) for Birthday Message campaign - highlight state differences, deployment lag, and scheduling alignment
